parsed.generic_mechanism: When interventions use the same causal reframing, experiential prompts, and freedom framing in the same sequence, they exert equivalent cumulative belief-change pressure.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block recasts indulgence as conditioned relief and failed satisfaction, then contrasts restriction with preference change. Relatable cycles provide some demonstration, but sweeping causal claims and repeated assurances leave much of the promised ease unearned.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The block recasts indulgence as conditioned relief and failed satisfaction, then contrasts restriction with preference change. Relatable cycles provide some demonstration, but sweeping causal claims and repeated assurances leave much of the promised ease unearned.
